all_repos.name: MadsLorentzen/ai-job-search
all_repos.description: AI-powered job application framework built on Claude Code. Fork it, fill in your profile, and let Claude evaluate jobs, tailor CVs, write cover letters, and prepare you for interviews.

all_repos.name: SmartlyDressedGames/U3-SDK
all_repos.description: Source code for Unturned, a free open-world zombie survival sandbox game.

all_repos.name: addyosmani/agent-skills
all_repos.description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

all_repos.name: VoltAgent/awesome-design-md
all_repos.description: A collection of DESIGN.md files analysis by popular brand design systems. Drop one into your project and let coding agents generate a matching UI.

all_repos.name: iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
all_repos.description: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.

all_repos.name: wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP
all_repos.description: This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities

all_repos.name: anthropics/claude-cookbooks
all_repos.description: A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.

all_repos.name: vxcontrol/pentagi
all_repos.description: Fully autonomous AI Agents system capable of performing complex penetration testing tasks

all_repos.name: unclecode/crawl4ai
all_repos.description: 🚀🤖 Crawl4AI: Open-source LLM Friendly Web Crawler & Scraper. Don't be shy, join here:https://discord.gg/jP8KfhDhyN

all_repos.name: imthenachoman/How-To-Secure-A-Linux-Server
all_repos.description: An evolving how-to guide for securing a Linux server.
